concerns.text: FR-001 (Download/Merge) and SC-001 (≥85% coverage) lack a specific task to calculate and log the actual coverage percentage. T017 logs the 'target' but does not explicitly task the implementation of the calculation logic required to verify SC-001.

SC-002 requires measuring a model convergence rate (≥95% success). Tasks T018 (unit test) and T024 (logging/error handling) do not include a task to aggregate convergence results across the dataset and calculate the specific success rate metric required by SC-002.

T016 requires 'contract validation' against `merged_dataset.schema.yaml`, but T007 only creates `data-model.md`. There is no task to create the `merged_dataset.schema.yaml` file itself, making the validation step impossible to implement.

FR-005 and SC-003 require a sensitivity analysis sweeping precipitation thresholds to test stability. T028 implements a 'sensitivity analysis' but the description ('continuous subset stability and binary threshold sweep') is ambiguous and does not explicitly map to the 'sweeping thresholds' requirement of FR-005, risking implementation of the wrong metric.

The spec's Edge Cases require handling datasets >7GB via 'chunking'. T033 mentions 'memory efficiency' in Phase 6 (Polish), but no task in Phase 3 (Data Ingestion) explicitly implements the chunking logic required to satisfy this constraint during the merge.
